name: Elan Valley: Caban Coch & Garreg Ddu Dams
highlights: Victorian dam architecture and red kite skies at the southern end of the Elan chain.
points_of_interest: Elan Village (purpose-built 1890s); Caban Coch dam; Nant-y-Gro dam (Dambusters test site)
viewpoints: Reflections of oak woodland in Caban Coch; Elan Valley visitor centre viewpoint
water_features: Caban Coch & Garreg Ddu reservoirs; River Elan
picnic_spots: Elan Valley visitor centre lawn; lay-bys along dam road
parking_start: Elan Valley Visitor Centre car park (pay & display)
food_drink_nearby: Elan Valley Visitor Centre café; Elan Valley Hotel; Cornhill Inn Rhayader
hazards_notes: Exposed road section can be cold; look out for red kites & pied flycatchers
